prd_coverage.tool_evidence: ls found 24 wideframes covering 8 core screens across desktop/tablet/mobile; PRD grep confirms dashboard, board, task_list, task_detail, trace_explorer, document_viewer, approval_gates, and search_results are all required

component_traceability.tool_evidence: grep found 0 data-ds-id occurrences across wireframes, while component-map.json enumerates 21 mapped flow blocks

storyboard_completeness.tool_evidence: storyboards.json contains 16 trajectories versus 21 PRD journey entries

layout_compilability.tool_evidence: layout-rules.json is valid JSON and defines global shell plus screen rules for dashboard, board, approval_gates, document_viewer, trace_explorer, task_detail, search_results, and task_list across desktop/tablet/mobile

conflict_resolution.tool_evidence: prd-ds-conflicts.md lists 3 conflicts with resolution direction for each, but modal handling remains partly exception-based rather than fully normalized

wireframe_articulation.tool_evidence: 24 wideframes passed box-grid format checks (every file box>tree); sampled wireframes include multiple states and dense annotations, with avg 47.21 annotation markers per wideframe and connected flows showing 15-18 arrows each

fix_queue.detail: Add explicit data-ds-id tags to wireframe elements; current grep result is 0 matches across all wideframes, so component-map selectors cannot be traced back to rendered contract surfaces
Cover the 5 missing PRD journeys; PRD grep shows 21 Journey entries while storyboards.json defines only 16 trajectories
Resolve the dashboard Create Plan interaction definitively; conflict report still leaves modal behavior as an evaluator exception instead of a normalized contract decision
